meaning: adj.开胃的,香喷喷的,风味极佳的,可口的,味香的n.开胃的菜肴
examples: There will be a change of taste towards a more savoury-flavored menu.
But they also broke a less savoury record.
Instead, I tried to change the subject. Did he like cakes or savoury pastries?
It is fantastic for people-watching while munching on the famous Mumbai bhelpuri (fried, savoury rounds of dough).
For each dish they finished off they received a more savoury meal later in camp.
